metadata.description: Dispatch tasks to cursor-agent from Claude Code with worktree isolation, background jobs, and session boundary safety.

plugins.name: cursor
plugins.description: Five slash commands (/cursor:setup, /cursor:dispatch, /cursor:status, /cursor:result, /cursor:cancel) that hand a task off to cursor-agent in an isolated git worktree. Foreground or background, with full job control and per-Claude-session filtering.
